title: Unified dictation control plane
value: Add a single Omarchy voice layer that can toggle dictation, push text into focused apps, and expose health checks for models/audio.
next: Wire status checks into om system diagnose and expose install hints for each speech backend.

title: Monitor profile studio
value: Turn monitor setup into saved profiles for desk, laptop, projector, Steam Deck, and rotated devices.
next: Add profile save/apply commands and TUI preview of current Hyprland monitor JSON.

title: Wallpaper-to-theme forge
repos: omarchy-theme-generator, omarchy-themes-generator, omarchy-theme-generator-jaime, omarchy-theme-builder, aether, tema
value: Generate full Omarchy theme packs from wallpapers and validate colors across terminal, Waybar, Walker, Hyprlock, and editors.
next: Add om theme forge with palette extraction, contrast validation, and package export.

title: Editor theme sync hub
repos: omazed, Neovim-theme-switcher, omarchy-tmux, omarchy-tmux-galvao, omarchy-zsh, omarchy-fish
value: Keep Zed, Neovim, tmux, zsh, and fish visually synchronized with the active Omarchy theme.
next: Add om theme sync to report/configure per-app hook status.

title: Waybar gallery and hot-swap
value: Preview and apply Waybar layouts without replacing the whole desktop config.
next: Add om waybar browse/apply with backup and rollback.

title: Clipboard, launcher, and cheat-sheet pack
value: Bundle daily workflow utilities into a keyboard-first command palette.
next: Add om tools install/enable status for clipboard, snippets, and reference overlays.

title: Wayland annotation suite
value: Make screen annotation, measurement, and drawing tools discoverable from one workflow.
next: Add om annotate launcher with availability checks and suggested keybindings.

title: Live wallpaper and workspace backgrounds
value: Add animated/current-workspace wallpaper controls with caching and Hyprland reload safety.
next: Add om wallpaper lab to browse, set, and test workspace-specific backgrounds.

title: Laptop network kit
value: Add VPN/Bluetooth/container toggles to the TUI with status and quick repair.
next: Add om network status/toggle wrappers around available local tools.

title: Cleanup and package curator
value: Expose safe package cleanup, app removal, and package discovery with dry-run previews.
next: Add om clean plan/apply with explicit confirmation and rollback notes.

title: Steam/gaming mode switcher
value: Offer one-click session tuning for gaming, Steam Deck, VM, and container workflows.
next: Add om mode gaming with service/app status and reversible tweaks.

title: Backup and migration console
value: Add backup/migration checks that know about dotfiles, configs, and repo mirrors.
next: Add om backup plan to inventory targets and report missing mounts/tools.

title: Webapp and browser profile studio
value: Add a premium app-management surface for Chromium profiles, GUI helpers, and webapp launchers.
next: Add om apps list/create/status with browser profile checks.

title: Platform adaptation matrix
repos: armarchy, deckarchy, okimarchy, omarchy-nix, omarchy-cachyos, omarchy-on-cachyos, Fedpunk, ohmydebn
value: Document and compare platform-specific deltas for ARM, Steam Deck, NixOS, CachyOS, Fedora, and Debian.
next: Add om lab ports to summarize support risks and transferable patches.

title: Local community hub
value: Turn cloned curated lists into local searchable resources for themes, setups, and tools.
next: Add om lab search that indexes README titles, repo descriptions, and curated links.
